 /// Check if a message should be summarized (old tool result > 200 chars).
 fn should_summarize_message(msg: &Message) -> bool {
     msg.role == "tool" && msg.content.as_ref().map(|c| c.len() > 200).unwrap_or(false)
 }

 /// Execute a tool call by name with the given arguments.
 pub async fn execute(
     name: &str,
     args: &Value,
     project_dir: &Path,
     profile: SafetyProfile,
 ) -> ToolResult {
     match name {
-        "read_file" => read::execute(args, project_dir),
+         /* ~ changed by cargo-mutants ~ */
         "write_file" => write::execute(args, project_dir),
         "edit_file" => edit::execute(args, project_dir),
         "bash" => bash::execute(args, project_dir, profile).await,
         "ls" => ls::execute(args, project_dir),
         _ => ToolResult {
             output: format!("Unknown tool: {}", name),
             success: false,
         },
